prompt:
[Subject] Reference Image 1 and Image 2.

[Pose and Expression]

Standing straight on the beach grass, looking directly at the camera. Hair is blowing naturally across the face in the strong sea breeze, with a calm, sentimental expression gazing through the hair.

[Clothing]

Wearing an oversized-fit light pink long-sleeved shirt with some wet spots at the bottom. Buttons are undone, naturally revealing part of the hip and abdomen, with a simple black bikini underneath for a natural yet bold beach look.

[Hair and Makeup Details]

Long, matte red-brown hair with natural volume. Unstyled hair covering the face adds mystery. Makeup is transparent and natural, emphasizing clean skin tone and calm lips without artificial colors.

[Lighting and Direction]

Soft, subtle late afternoon natural sunlight from the back right. This backlighting highlights the red tones in the hair and casts long shadows of the palm tree and the subject onto the grass, creating a bright and peaceful front lighting.

[Texture and Mood]

The texture of the wet shirt fabric, green grass, and rough palm tree trunk contrast vividly. Harmony of light pink, black, green, and blue creates a cozy, refreshing, and free emotional mood typical of a resort film snapshot.

[Film and Camera Settings]

Medium full shot at eye level capturing up to the thighs. Emotional snapshot style capturing daily moments. Moderate depth of field keeps the subject and palm tree sharp while softly blurring the sea and coastline in the background.

[Background Elements]

A coastal promenade with green grass and a large palm tree trunk next to the subject. Calm sea waves, distant boats, white alphabet sculptures, and a unique blue animal statue on the grass create an exotic beach scene.

[Signature] Small Threads logo at bottom right with "CHAse" written in white cursive. 4:5 ratio
